    A

    addBoughtCard(Card) - Method in class com.splendor.web.game.model.Player
    Moves a card to the tableau and increases prestige by the card's points.
    addNoble(Noble) - Method in class com.splendor.web.game.model.Player
     
    addReservedCard(Card) - Method in class com.splendor.web.game.model.Player
     
    addToken(Token) - Method in class com.splendor.web.game.model.Player
     
    addTokens(String, int) - Method in class com.splendor.web.game.GameSession
    Returns tokens to the bank (e.g.
    advanceToNextPlayer() - Method in class com.splendor.web.game.GameSession
    Advances currentPlayerIndex circularly to the next player.

    B

    buyCardFromTable(GameSession, int, int) - Method in class com.splendor.web.game.GameService
     
    buyCardFromTable(GameSession, int, int) - Method in class com.splendor.web.game.WebCardRulesService
    Purchases an open card if the current player can pay with gems (and gold as wildcard).
    buyReserved(int, HttpSession, RedirectAttributes) - Method in class com.splendor.web.controller.GameController
    Purchases a card from the current player's reserved hand by slot index.
    buyReservedCard(GameSession, int) - Method in class com.splendor.web.game.GameService
     
    buyReservedCard(GameSession, int) - Method in class com.splendor.web.game.WebCardRulesService
    Purchases a reserved card by index in the current player's hand.
    buyTable(int, int, HttpSession, RedirectAttributes) - Method in class com.splendor.web.controller.GameController
    Purchases a face-up development card from the table using the current player's tokens (and gold as wild).

    C

    Card - Class in com.splendor.web.game.model
    A development card: level, gem discount colour, prestige points, and a five-digit cost string (black→white order) used by purchase and noble logic.
    Card(int, String, int, String) - Constructor for class com.splendor.web.game.model.Card
     
    checkGameEnd(GameSession) - Method in class com.splendor.web.game.TurnPhaseService
    Sets GameSession.setFinalRound(boolean) when any player reaches GameSession.getPointsToWin().
    checkGemType(String) - Static method in class com.splendor.web.game.model.Token
     
    chooseAction(Player) - Method in class com.splendor.web.game.WebCPUStrategy
     
    chooseBuyCardIndex(Player, int) - Method in class com.splendor.web.game.WebCPUStrategy
     
    chooseBuyLevel(Player) - Method in class com.splendor.web.game.WebCPUStrategy
     
    chooseBuySource(Player) - Method in class com.splendor.web.game.WebCPUStrategy
     
    chooseNoble(Player, ArrayList) - Method in class com.splendor.web.game.WebCPUStrategy
     
    chooseReserveCardIndex(Player, int) - Method in class com.splendor.web.game.WebCPUStrategy
     
    chooseReservedCardIndex(Player) - Method in class com.splendor.web.game.WebCPUStrategy
     
    chooseReserveLevel(Player) - Method in class com.splendor.web.game.WebCPUStrategy
     
    chooseReserveSource(Player) - Method in class com.splendor.web.game.WebCPUStrategy
     
    chooseThreeTokenColors(Player) - Method in class com.splendor.web.game.WebCPUStrategy
    Picks up to three distinct colours that still have bank chips, in shuffled order, space-separated.
    chooseTokenToReturn(Player) - Method in class com.splendor.web.game.WebCPUStrategy
     
    chooseTwoTokenColor(Player) - Method in class com.splendor.web.game.WebCPUStrategy
     
    com.splendor - package com.splendor
     
    com.splendor.web.controller - package com.splendor.web.controller
     
    com.splendor.web.game - package com.splendor.web.game
     
    com.splendor.web.game.data - package com.splendor.web.game.data
     
    com.splendor.web.game.model - package com.splendor.web.game.model
     
    computeWinnerPlayerIds(GameSession) - Method in class com.splendor.web.game.GameOutcomeService
    Finds all player IDs tied for the win: highest prestige, then fewest bought cards among those tied on points.
    computeWinnerPlayerIds(GameSession) - Method in class com.splendor.web.game.GameService
     
    CpuTurnService - Class in com.splendor.web.game
    Runs a single CPU turn against a GameSession: chooses an action via WebCPUStrategy, applies it through token/card rules, handles over-limit returns, then TurnPhaseService.finishTurn(GameSession).
    CpuTurnService(WebTokenRulesService, WebCardRulesService, TurnPhaseService) - Constructor for class com.splendor.web.game.CpuTurnService
     

    D

    DataLoader - Class in com.splendor.web.game.data
    Loads /config.properties from the classpath on construction and exposes helpers to read properties and arbitrary UTF-8 text resources (e.g.
    DataLoader() - Constructor for class com.splendor.web.game.data.DataLoader
    Loads global properties from /config.properties.
    deductTokens(String, int) - Method in class com.splendor.web.game.model.Player
    Removes up to numberOfTokens chips matching gemType from the player's hand only.

    E

    equals(Object) - Method in record class com.splendor.web.game.PlayerSetup
    Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this one.
    executeOneCPUTurn(GameSession) - Method in class com.splendor.web.game.CpuTurnService
    Executes one action for gs.getCurrentPlayer() (must be CPU).
    executeOneCPUTurn(GameSession) - Method in class com.splendor.web.game.GameService
    Runs exactly one CPU turn (mutates gs) and returns log lines for the UI.
    executeReturnTokens(GameSession, List) - Method in class com.splendor.web.game.GameService
     
    executeReturnTokens(GameSession, List) - Method in class com.splendor.web.game.WebTokenRulesService
    Returns gems from the current player to the bank until at or under the token limit, processing tokensToReturn in order (one removal per listed colour per iteration).

    F

    finishTurn(GameSession) - Method in class com.splendor.web.game.GameService
     
    finishTurn(GameSession) - Method in class com.splendor.web.game.TurnPhaseService
    Processes noble acquisition for the player who just acted, updates GameSession end-state flags, and advances GameSession.advanceToNextPlayer().

    G

    game(HttpSession, Model, RedirectAttributes) - Method in class com.splendor.web.controller.GameController
    Main game entry: loads session state and returns the appropriate view.
    GameController - Class in com.splendor.web.controller
    Spring MVC controller for in-progress gameplay: rendering the board, handling human actions via form posts, and delegating turn completion and CPU turns to GameService.
    GameController(GameService) - Constructor for class com.splendor.web.controller.GameController
     
    GameOutcomeService - Class in com.splendor.web.game
    Computes winner identity after a game ends, including Splendor tie-breaking rules.
    GameOutcomeService() - Constructor for class com.splendor.web.game.GameOutcomeService
     
    GameService - Class in com.splendor.web.game
    Web game façade: delegates to setup, token rules, card rules, turn flow, CPU, and outcome services so controllers depend on one bean while logic stays split by responsibility.
    GameService(WebGameSetupService, WebTokenRulesService, WebCardRulesService, TurnPhaseService, CpuTurnService, GameOutcomeService) - Constructor for class com.splendor.web.game.GameService
    Wires the façade to all specialized game services.
    GameSession - Class in com.splendor.web.game
    Serializable aggregate of everything needed for one Splendor game in an HTTP session: gem bank counts, closed and open development cards by level, available nobles, players, current turn index, and end-game flags.
    GameSession(List, int, int, int, int) - Constructor for class com.splendor.web.game.GameSession
    Initializes bank token counts and creates Player instances from setup; card and noble lists start empty until WebGameSetupService loads them.
    getAvailNobles() - Method in class com.splendor.web.game.GameSession
     
    getBoughtCards() - Method in class com.splendor.web.game.model.Player
     
    getBoughtCardsGemValueCount(int) - Method in class com.splendor.web.game.model.Player
    Counts bought cards whose discount colour matches the given index (for purchase/noble math).
    getClosedCardsByLevel(int) - Method in class com.splendor.web.game.GameSession
     
    getClosedLevel1() - Method in class com.splendor.web.game.GameSession
     
    getClosedLevel2() - Method in class com.splendor.web.game.GameSession
     
    getClosedLevel3() - Method in class com.splendor.web.game.GameSession
     
    getCurrentPlayer() - Method in class com.splendor.web.game.GameSession
     
    getCurrentPlayerIndex() - Method in class com.splendor.web.game.GameSession

    getGoldTokenCount() - Method in class com.splendor.web.game.model.Player
     
    getImageSlug() - Method in class com.splendor.web.game.model.Noble
    Maps a known noble name to a web asset filename stem (no extension).
    getLevel() - Method in class com.splendor.web.game.model.Card

    H

    hashCode() - Method in record class com.splendor.web.game.PlayerSetup
    Returns a hash code value for this object.
    HomeController - Class in com.splendor.web.controller
    Spring MVC controller for the home page and starting a new game.
    HomeController(GameService, ObjectMapper) - Constructor for class com.splendor.web.controller.HomeController
    Creates the controller with game logic and JSON parsing dependencies.
    human() - Method in record class com.splendor.web.game.PlayerSetup
    Returns the value of the human record component.

    I

    index(Model) - Method in class com.splendor.web.controller.HomeController
    Serves the new-game setup page at the application root.
    isFinalRound() - Method in class com.splendor.web.game.GameSession
     
    isGameOver() - Method in class com.splendor.web.game.GameSession
     
    isHuman() - Method in class com.splendor.web.controller.PlayerSetupPayload
     
    isHuman() - Method in class com.splendor.web.game.model.Player
     

    M

    main(String[]) - Static method in class com.splendor.SplendorApplication
    Starts the Spring application and runs the embedded server.

    N

    name() - Method in record class com.splendor.web.game.PlayerSetup
    Returns the value of the name record component.
    newGame(String, HttpSession, RedirectAttributes) - Method in class com.splendor.web.controller.HomeController
    Accepts posted player configuration, starts a new game, and redirects to /game.
    newGame(List) - Method in class com.splendor.web.game.GameService
     
    newGame(List) - Method in class com.splendor.web.game.WebGameSetupService
    Creates a new game with bank tokens, shuffled development cards, and the correct noble count.
    Noble - Class in com.splendor.web.game.model
    A noble tile: name, fixed prestige, and a five-digit requirement string (bonus gems from bought cards).
    Noble(String, int, String) - Constructor for class com.splendor.web.game.model.Noble
     
    NobleAcquisitionService - Class in com.splendor.web.game
    Assigns noble tiles when a player's purchased-card bonuses meet a noble's requirements.
    NobleAcquisitionService() - Constructor for class com.splendor.web.game.NobleAcquisitionService
     

    P

    Player - Class in com.splendor.web.game.model
    Mutable per-player state during a game: gem chips, reserved and purchased development cards, acquired nobles, running prestige total, and display metadata (id, human flag, name).
    Player(int, boolean, String) - Constructor for class com.splendor.web.game.model.Player
     
    PlayerSetup - Record Class in com.splendor.web.game
    Immutable description of one player seat when starting a new game.
    PlayerSetup(String, boolean) - Constructor for record class com.splendor.web.game.PlayerSetup
    Creates an instance of a PlayerSetup record class.
    PlayerSetupPayload - Class in com.splendor.web.controller
    Data transfer object for one row of the new-game form, deserialized from JSON posted as playersJson.
    PlayerSetupPayload() - Constructor for class com.splendor.web.controller.PlayerSetupPayload
     
    processNobleAcquisition(GameSession, Player) - Method in class com.splendor.web.game.NobleAcquisitionService
    If the player qualifies for one or more available nobles, takes the first qualifying noble (deterministic order).

    R

    readResourceFile(String) - Method in class com.splendor.web.game.data.DataLoader
    Reads an entire classpath resource as UTF-8 text, with lines rejoined using the platform line separator.
    removeNoble(Noble) - Method in class com.splendor.web.game.GameSession
    Removes a noble after a player acquires it.
    removePlayerTokens(int, int) - Method in class com.splendor.web.game.model.Player
    Removes non-gold or gold tokens by palette index without updating the bank (legacy/helper).
    removeReservedCard(Card) - Method in class com.splendor.web.game.model.Player
     
    removeTokens(String, int) - Method in class com.splendor.web.game.GameSession
    Removes tokens from the bank (e.g.
    reserveCardFromDeck(GameSession, int) - Method in class com.splendor.web.game.GameService
     
    reserveCardFromDeck(GameSession, int) - Method in class com.splendor.web.game.WebCardRulesService
    Takes the top card of the closed deck for the level into reserves; grants gold if available.
    reserveCardFromTable(GameSession, int, int) - Method in class com.splendor.web.game.GameService
     
    reserveCardFromTable(GameSession, int, int) - Method in class com.splendor.web.game.WebCardRulesService
    Moves a face-up card into the current player's reserves and refills the slot; grants one gold if any remain.
    reserveDeck(int, HttpSession, RedirectAttributes) - Method in class com.splendor.web.controller.GameController
    Reserves the top card from the closed deck of the given level without revealing it to others in the UI beyond the reserve action.
    reserveTable(int, int, HttpSession, RedirectAttributes) - Method in class com.splendor.web.controller.GameController
    Reserves a face-up development card from the table for the current player (gold taken if available).
    returnTokens(List, HttpSession, RedirectAttributes) - Method in class com.splendor.web.controller.GameController
    Returns excess tokens to the bank when the current player is over the per-player token limit.

    S

    setCurrentPlayerIndex(int) - Method in class com.splendor.web.game.GameSession
     
    setFinalRound(boolean) - Method in class com.splendor.web.game.GameSession

    setName(String) - Method in class com.splendor.web.controller.PlayerSetupPayload
     
    SplendorApplication - Class in com.splendor
    Entry point for the Splendor web application.
    SplendorApplication() - Constructor for class com.splendor.SplendorApplication
     

    T

    take2(String, HttpSession, RedirectAttributes) - Method in class com.splendor.web.controller.GameController
    Handles "take two tokens of the same colour" when the bank has at least four of that colour.
    take2Tokens(GameSession, String) - Method in class com.splendor.web.game.GameService
     
    take2Tokens(GameSession, String) - Method in class com.splendor.web.game.WebTokenRulesService
    Takes two tokens of the same colour when the bank holds at least four of that colour.
    take3(String, String, String, HttpSession, RedirectAttributes) - Method in class com.splendor.web.controller.GameController
    Handles "take three different coloured tokens" when it is the current human player's turn.
    take3Tokens(GameSession, List) - Method in class com.splendor.web.game.GameService
     
    take3Tokens(GameSession, List) - Method in class com.splendor.web.game.WebTokenRulesService
    Takes one token of each of three distinct colours from the bank for the current player.
    Token - Class in com.splendor.web.game.model
    One gem chip in a player's hand.
    Token(String) - Constructor for class com.splendor.web.game.model.Token
     
    toString() - Method in class com.splendor.web.game.model.Card
     
    toString() - Method in class com.splendor.web.game.model.Noble
     
    toString() - Method in class com.splendor.web.game.model.Token
    toString() - Method in record class com.splendor.web.game.PlayerSetup
    Returns a string representation of this record class.
    TurnPhaseService - Class in com.splendor.web.game
    End-of-turn pipeline: automatic noble visit, final-round / game-over flags, then advance current player.
    TurnPhaseService(NobleAcquisitionService) - Constructor for class com.splendor.web.game.TurnPhaseService
     

    W

    WebCardRulesService - Class in com.splendor.web.game
    Rules for development cards: reserve, buy, and paying with tokens.
    WebCardRulesService() - Constructor for class com.splendor.web.game.WebCardRulesService
     
    WebCPUStrategy - Class in com.splendor.web.game
    Heuristic AI for CPU players.
    WebCPUStrategy(GameSession) - Constructor for class com.splendor.web.game.WebCPUStrategy
     
    WebGameSetupService - Class in com.splendor.web.game
    Builds a fresh GameSession: reads configuration and CSV data, shuffles decks, deals face-up cards, and selects nobles for the player count.
    WebGameSetupService() - Constructor for class com.splendor.web.game.WebGameSetupService
     
    WebTokenRulesService - Class in com.splendor.web.game
    Splendor token actions against a GameSession bank: take three distinct, take two same, and return excess when over GameSession.getMaxTokensPerPlayer().
    WebTokenRulesService() - Constructor for class com.splendor.web.game.WebTokenRulesService
